The '''Corellian Destroyer''' was a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] favored by [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] for its huge damage output.

==History==
[[File:CorellianDestroyer_GingDarjeek.jpg|thumb|left|230px|Ging Darjeek standing alongside a Corellian Destroyer]]
[[Ging Darjeek]] stood alongside a Corellian Destroyer in the lounge of the [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], where it was later collected by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]. The Corellian Destroyer was also held by some [[Kerritamba Village|Kerritamba]] warriors in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] region of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
